versions.version_description: Added an A and B7 turnaround. substituted some D7s for the Bm.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: From live concert, to be released. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOLkmecOWQM.

performance.name: Live at the Hippodrome Theatre, Baltimore, 10/25/2017

content:
On The Radio  Donna Summer

[Intro]
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]A11[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]A11[/ch]                      [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
Someone found a letter you wrote me, on the radio[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]A11[/ch]            [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]
and they told the world just how you felt[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
it must have fallen out of a hole in your old brown overcoat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                                [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]
they never said your name but I knew just who they meant.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A11[/ch]                      [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
Oh, I was so surprised and shocked, and I wonder too[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]A11[/ch]            [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]
      if by chance you heard it for yourself[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I never told a soul just how I've been feeling over you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
but they said it really loud they said it on the air[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio whoa oh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio whoa oh oh now, now[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]A11[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
Don't it kinda strike you sad when you hear our song[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]A11[/ch]                         [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]
things are not the same since we broke up last June[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
the only thing that I wanna hear is that you love me still[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
and that you think you'll be comin' home real soon whoa[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]A11[/ch]                       [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
oh yeah it kind of made me feel proud when I heard him say[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]A11[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]
   you couldn't find the words to say it yourself[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
and now in my heart I know I can say what I really feel[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]
'cause they said it really loud they said it on the air[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio whoa oh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio oh whoa___________Oh oh on the radio[/tab]

[Pre Sax Solo]
[ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]D7sus4[/ch]

[Sax Solo]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]

[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]A11[/ch]                      [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
If you think that love isn't found on the radio[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]A11[/ch]               [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]
well tune right in you may find the love you lost[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
'cause now I'm sitting here with the man I sent away long ago[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]
You’ve fi-n’lly realized they said it really loud[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio whoa oh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio whoa oh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
on the radio whoa oh oh on the radio, radio, radio[/tab]
